project_type: Android Kotlin Jetpack Compose app - modular Split-APK architecture
build_system: Gradle Kotlin DSL with version catalog (gradle/libs.versions.toml). AGP 8.7.3, Kotlin 2.0.21. No Android SDK available in sandbox.
test_framework: JUnit 4 with kotlinx-coroutines-test. Domain tests in domain/src/test/kotlin/, app tests in app/src/test/java/
build_command: Cannot run full Android build (no SDK). Validate Kotlin syntax and Gradle config correctness via AST/structure checks.
test_command: Cannot run tests (no Android SDK). Validate test file syntax and structure.
verification_instructions: 1. Check Gradle config files parse correctly (settings.gradle.kts, all build.gradle.kts). 2. Verify Kotlin files have correct package declarations and imports. 3. Confirm module dependencies are declared correctly. 4. Verify no feature code remains in :app base.
setup_instructions: No Android SDK available. Work with file structure and Kotlin syntax only.
environment_constraints: No Android SDK installed. No Gradle daemon available. Cannot run assembleDebug or tests. Must rely on structural/syntax correctness. CI (GitHub Actions) is the authoritative build verifier per AGENTS.md.
contribution_requirements: One coherent commit per gate. Commit message format: 'Gate 0: <short result>'. Do not introduce DI frameworks. Reuse existing utilities. Keep domain pure Kotlin. Follow CI-first gate policy.
key_patterns: Manual DI via PainkillerContainer (lazy singletons). NavHost-based navigation in PainkillerNavGraph. Theme in PainkillerTheme with PainkillerColors. Domain is pure Kotlin/JVM module. App uses Ktor for HTTP, kotlinx.serialization, DataStore, Navigation Compose, Security Crypto.
directory_structure: Root: build.gradle.kts, settings.gradle.kts, gradle/libs.versions.toml. :app module has all Android code (UI, data, DI). :domain has pure Kotlin business logic (files, github, conflict, upload, path, etc). Feature code to move: data/files/*, data/github/*, data/security/*, data/settings/*, ui/auth/*, ui/flow/*, ui/repotree/*, ui/screens/*. Shell to keep: MainActivity, Application, theme, components, navigation shell.
